Package org.eventb.core.sc.state

Interface ILabelSymbolInfo

All Superinterfaces:
Comparable<ISymbolInfo<?,?>>, IAttributedSymbol, ISymbolInfo<ILabeledElement,IInternalElementType<? extends ILabeledElement>>
All Known Implementing Classes:
LabelSymbolInfo
public interface ILabelSymbolInfo extends ISymbolInfo<ILabeledElement,IInternalElementType<? extends ILabeledElement>>
Common protocol for labeled elements stored in a label symbol table.

Clients that need to contribute symbols to a label symbol table, ILabelSymbolTable, must implement this interface.

Since:
1.0
See Also:
  • ILabelSymbolTable
  • IMachineLabelSymbolTable
  • IEventLabelSymbolTable

  • Method Details

    • createSCElement

      ILabeledElement createSCElement(IInternalElement parent, String elementName, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor) throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Create a statically checked element for this symbol with the specified parent.
      Parameters:
      parent - the parent of the element to create
      elementName - ignored parameter
      monitor - a progress monitor, or null if progress reporting is not desired
      Returns:
      the created statically checked identifier element
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException - if there was a problem creating the element
